# sevalla_pipeline (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Sevalla pipeline.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_pipeline" "example" {
  id = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
}

output "pipeline_type" {
  value = data.sevalla_pipeline.example.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the pipeline.

### Read-Only

- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the pipeline.
- `created_at` (String) When the pipeline was created.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the pipeline.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID associated with the pipeline.
- `type` (String) The type of the pipeline (trunk or branch).
- `updated_at` (String) When the pipeline was last updated.
